name: Grim
title: the Grim Reaper
lore: Grim is the Paragon of Altharion, the Bastion of the Graveborns. He is known as the legendary hitman who exists between the physical world and the dead. Wielding two supernatural firearms named Twin Shadows, he executes his targets with rhythmic precision.

abilities.name: Twin Shadows
abilities.details: Grim's basic attacks fire twice—once from each gun. The second shot deals a percentage of the first shot's damage as [ap]magical damage[/] and applies on-hit effects.[n]He will shoot the same target, else another target in range. The second shot is also affected by critical strike modifiers, but the critical chance is based on the first shot.

abilities.name: Piercing Darkness
abilities.details: Grym fires a high-velocity shadow laser in a line, dealing [ad]physical damage[/] (scaling with [ad]physical power[/] and [ap]magical damage[/]) to all enemies hit.[n]If an active Shadow Clone is present, the clone fires its own Piercing Darkness towards Grym's target simultaneously, dealing reduced damage on the same enemies.

abilities.name: Umbral Snare
abilities.details: Grym shoots out a concentrated ball of shadow energy in a target direction, dealing [ap]magical damage[/] (scaling with [ap]magical damage[/]) to all enemies hit and inflicts a decaying [db]slow[/].[n]If an active Shadow Clone is present, the clone fires its own Shadow Snare towards Grym's target direction. Enemies hit by both Shadow Snare will be briefly [db]rooted[/].

abilities.name: Shadow Clone
abilities.details: Grym dashes a short distance, leaving a Shadow Clone at his starting location for a few seconds. He can re-activate this ability to instantly return to the Shadow Clone.

abilities.name: Last Whisper
abilities.details: Grym creates a Living Shadows that follows each of the nearby enemy heroes, causing them to be [db]nearsighted[/].[n]He can then recast Last Whisper to replace himself with any of the Living Shadows. The enemy target that Grim replaces the shadow with will be [db]silenced[/] for a short duration.
